title: Pantedu — Authority Cooperation Forensics
description: Phase 25.R.22 — Visibilità su eventi custodia chiavi + cooperazione autorità + tentativi di accesso a /admin/* in finestre temporali sensibili. Fonti: crypto_custody_events (DB) + waf_logs (DB) per cross-reference investigation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM crypto_custody_events WHERE event_type = 'authority_request' AND occurred_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${authority_name}' = '' OR authority_name LIKE CONCAT('%','${authority_name}','%')) AND ('${teacher_id}' = '' OR teacher_id = '${teacher_id}')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM crypto_custody_events WHERE event_type = 'data_provided' AND occurred_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${authority_name}' = '' OR authority_name LIKE CONCAT('%','${authority_name}','%')) AND ('${teacher_id}' = '' OR teacher_id = '${teacher_id}')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM crypto_custody_events WHERE event_type IN ('kek_emergency_access','kms_rotated','kms_generated','data_recovered') AND occurred_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM waf_logs WHERE request_uri LIKE '/admin/%' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT $__timeGroup(occurred_at, '1h') AS time, event_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM crypto_custody_events WHERE occurred_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, event_type ORDER BY 1

SELECT occurred_at AS 'Quando', event_type AS 'Tipo', teacher_id AS 'Teacher', authority_name AS 'Autorità', authority_ref AS 'Rif. procedimento', LEFT(description, 100) AS 'Descrizione', legal_basis AS 'Base giuridica', evidence_url AS 'Evidenza' FROM crypto_custody_events WHERE event_type IN ('authority_request','authority_granted','authority_denied','data_recovered','data_provided','kek_emergency_access') AND occurred_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${authority_name}' = '' OR authority_name LIKE CONCAT('%','${authority_name}','%')) AND ('${teacher_id}' = '' OR teacher_id = '${teacher_id}') ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 200

panels.title: 🛂 Heatmap accessi /admin/* intorno a eventi authority (last 30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts, '%Y-%m-%d') AS 'Data', ip AS 'IP', country AS 'Country', request_uri AS 'Path', COUNT(*) AS 'Hits', MAX(ts) AS 'Ultimo hit' FROM waf_logs WHERE request_uri LIKE '/admin/%' AND request_uri NOT LIKE '/admin/waf/api/%' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, ip, country, request_uri ORDER BY MAX(ts) DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT ts AS 'Quando', ip AS 'IP', country AS 'Country', request_uri AS 'Endpoint', outcome AS 'Outcome' FROM waf_logs WHERE (request_uri LIKE '/admin/crypto-status/export%' OR request_uri = '/admin/gdpr/authority-export') AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50
